## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement you want.

## Problem or Opportunity

What is the current limitation or user need?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the behavior you would like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

List any other approaches you considered.

## Additional Context

Add examples, screenshots, or references if useful.
